description: Initialize the Streamlit UI, connect to the LangGraph SQLite checkpoints, and display the synced Job Tracker dashboard.

userStories.title: Streamlit Foundation & Checkpoint Initialization
userStories.description: As a job seeker, I want to launch the Streamlit application and see it successfully connected to the LangGraph checkpoint database, so that I know the system is ready to read my active application threads.
acceptanceCriteria: Scenario: User launches the Streamlit app
Given the Streamlit app is started via uv run streamlit run
and Given the SQLite checkpoint database exists at data/checkpoints.sqlite
When I view the main page
Then I see the app title and a successful connection status to the checkpoint database.

tasks.description: Create src/ui/app.py with Streamlit page config and layout structure
Implement get_checkpointer() using SqliteSaver connecting to data/checkpoints.sqlite
Add UI element to display database connection status

userStories.title: Job Tracker Dashboard & Graph State Sync
userStories.description: As a job seeker, I want to view a dashboard of my job applications synced with their latest graph execution status, so that I can see which applications require my manual review or clarification.
acceptanceCriteria: Scenario: User views the job applications dashboard
Given the app is connected to the checkpointer
and Given there are jobs listed in data/job_tracker.json
Then I see a table or list of jobs
and Then the status of each job matches its latest state from the LangGraph checkpointer
and Then the updated status is written back to job_tracker.json

tasks.description: Implement function to query SqliteSaver for the latest state of each job (using job_id as thread_id)
Implement write-back function to update job_tracker.json with the latest graph statuses
Display the merged job data in a Streamlit dataframe or UI list on the main page
